sessions.topic: Peer R1 residual issues from Codex review
sessions.decision: Track as follow-up items, not blocking for PR #363

stances.rationale: R3: error propagation chain verified. git_helper exit(1) -> run_script check_call -> CalledProcessError -> cm_cli exit != 0 -> execute_cm_cli raises. Full error visibility achieved.

R3: All 5 root causes addressed. tqdm deadlock: isatty gate. Stale dir: rename-to-trash. Swallowed stderr: stderr surfacing + stdout summary. Error propagation: check_call chain. E2E stability: timeout + rmtree retry. Both repos have matching fixes.

R2: Cross-platform regression check passed. isatty() preserves TTY behavior on all OS. stderr thread is OS-agnostic. rmtree onerror harmless on POSIX. Only future concern: Python 3.12 onerror deprecation, non-blocking.
R2: Manager stdout error summary ensures backward compatibility with older comfy-cli. Diagnostic log tags are consistent. Error chain is complete. All changes are minimal and targeted.
R3: Final error propagation verification. Complete chain from git_helper through cm_cli to comfy-cli confirmed. Diagnostic logs flow correctly via both stdout and stderr.
R3: All 5 root causes addressed with matching fixes in both repos. Team coordination verified: manager-dev and cli-dev confirmed mutual compatibility.
R4 final: Both repos patched and pushed. Manager 4 commits on fix/reinstall-url-handling, CLI 1 commit on feat/support-manager-v4. All root causes addressed. Ready for CI validation.
R4 final: Consensus confirmed across all rounds. Changes are minimal, targeted, cross-platform safe, and mutually compatible. Recommend CI rerun to validate Windows E2E.
